message:
fix(node): require explicit --key-dir for release verification, improve slot scheduling fairness, and harden migration diagnostics

Release verification hardening (cli, main, verify_release_cli_e2e):
- Make --key-dir a required argument instead of optional; removes the
  built-in demo signing key fallback that could mask misconfigured
  deployments where no real trust root is provided
- Simplify load_verifying_keys to take &Path instead of Option<&Path>,
  removing the demo key branch entirely
- Extract write_release_key_dir helper in e2e tests to reduce duplication
  across test cases that need a key directory fixture
- Add new test verify_release_fails_without_key_dir confirming the CLI
  rejects invocations that omit the now-required flag
- Update existing tests (unlisted artifact, invalid key dir) to pass
  --key-dir explicitly

Control lane slot scheduling (control_lane_policy):
- Implement budget cascading so unused Cancel slots spill into the Timed
  budget, and unused Timed slots spill into the Ready budget; previously
  Ready tasks could starve when Cancel/Timed had reserved but unused
  capacity
- Preserve total_slots cap across all tiers to prevent overcommit

Migration diagnostics (dgis_migration_gate):
- Produce a distinct error message when cascade_risk_delta is NaN/Inf
  ("is not finite") vs when it simply exceeds the threshold, instead of
  formatting a non-finite float with {:.4} which yields unhelpful output

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
